---
name: Feature request
about: Suggest an improvement or new capability
title: ''
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem

What problem does this feature solve? Describe the use case — who needs this and why.

## Proposed solution

A clear description of what you'd like to see added or changed.

## Alternatives considered

Any alternative approaches you've thought about, and why you prefer the proposed solution.

## Additional context

Screenshots, mockups, or links to similar implementations in other tools.
